# Hi there 👋 I'm Tahir Aziz

**Full-Stack Developer** | **Cloud Architect** | **Open Source Enthusiast**

---

## 🚀 About Me

I'm a passionate full-stack developer with expertise in building scalable web applications and cloud-native solutions. With 3+ years of professional experience, I specialize in:

- **Backend**: Laravel, Node.js, PHP, Python
- **Frontend**: React, Vue.js, Inertia.js, Tailwind CSS
- **Cloud & DevOps**: AWS, Google Cloud, Azure, Docker, Kubernetes
- **Databases**: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB
- **AI/ML Integration**: OpenAI, Claude AI, Anthropic APIs

I'm passionate about creating well-documented, maintainable code and love contributing to open-source projects.

## ⭐ Featured Projects

### 🎨 [DocsAlot](https://docsalot.dev)
**AI-Powered Documentation Platform**  
A collaborative documentation platform with AI-driven content generation, search, and real-time collaboration features. Built with Next.js, OpenAI APIs, and PostgreSQL.

- **Tech**: Next.js, React, OpenAI API, PostgreSQL, TailwindCSS
- **Features**: AI-powered docs, real-time search, collaboration, version control

### 📊 [Plotly](https://plotly.app)
**Advanced Data Visualization Engine**  
Interactive data visualization library enabling creation of professional charts and dashboards with customizable themes and real-time data updates.

- **Tech**: React, D3.js, Node.js, MongoDB
- **Features**: 50+ chart types, real-time updates, export functionality

### 💻 [VSCode Mobile](https://vscodemobile.com)
**Remote VS Code Access Platform**  
Full-featured VS Code IDE accessible from any device. Includes file management, terminal access, extensions support, and real-time synchronization.

- **Tech**: React, WebSocket, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Docker
- **Features**: Remote development, terminal access, file sync, multi-user support
